prompt: Implement the following feature or change.
steps: Research the codebase to understand the existing patterns and conventions.
Implement the required changes following existing code style.
Add or update tests to cover the new functionality.
Run the test suite and fix any failures.
Run the linter and fix any violations.
Commit with a clear, descriptive commit message.
extra_instructions: Make the minimal set of changes needed. Follow existing patterns in the codebase. Do not refactor unrelated code.
